purpose: Bind sandbox-first BrowserRenderCapabilityResolver as method-selection authority before VPQ render smoke, visual review, and export promotion.

research_basis.claim: Playwright supports browser automation and managed browser installation; managed browsers must exist or be installable before Playwright screenshot proof can be claimed.
Chrome headless supports unattended browser operation and screenshots, but local sandbox launch must still be empirically proven.
WeasyPrint can render HTML/CSS to PDF and is suitable as a proxy render path when true browser screenshots are unavailable.

sandbox_first_policy.production_required_blocker: DENY_PRODUCTION_PROMOTION when requested_proof_tier is browser_screenshot_required and no true browser evidence exists

visual_gate_integration_points.action: Call resolver before screenshot/render proof; use selected method and honesty_label in review packet.
Require resolver decision and include selected-method artifacts, limitation label, and reliability ledger in export manifest.
Treat tracker as visual artifact; call resolver before claiming browser-render proof.
Use resolver for Google Sites/iPad/mobile render evidence tiers before promotion.
